title: Coherent Wild Update
description: Implementation of old mobs that did not win the mob vote and implementation of new vanilla style mobs like otters.
body:
# Coherent Wild Update

The Coherent Wild Update brings to life the mobs that didn’t make the cut in past mob votes, as well as new vanilla-style creatures. Since Mojang doesn’t always follow the community’s wishes, I’m stepping in to make it happen. This mod expands Minecraft’s world with fun and useful creatures that fit seamlessly into the game.

## ✅Features
1. **Crabs** A new mob that spawns on all beaches, whether snowy or regular. When defeated, it drops a crab claw, allowing players to build from a greater distance.

2. **Crab Claw Tool** Use this unique tool to extend your building range. Additionally, you can enchant it with Unbreaking to increase its durability, or repair it in the crafting table with another used claw.

## 📖Why Use Coherent Wild Update?
This mod is perfect for players who want to see more mob diversity while staying true to Minecraft’s classic style. By incorporating creatures the community has wanted for years, it provides a richer and more personalized experience without losing the game’s original charm.
